prompt_text:
### Demographics: 52-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~1.2 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 57.6 kg; Height 162.6 cm; BMI 21.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 111/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.4%; 9 months ago 10.5%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 227mg/dL; 9 months ago 229mg/dL; 6 months ago 242mg/dL; 3 months ago 211mg/dL; current 158mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 60.2kg; 9 months ago 56.7kg; 6 months ago 55.2kg; 3 months ago 53.7kg; current 57.6kg), Height (12 months ago 162.6cm; 9 months ago 162.6cm; 6 months ago 162.6cm; 3 months ago 162.6cm; current 162.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 111mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 7.0U/L; current 13U/L), AST (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 15U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; current 19mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 393mg/g; 9 months ago 567mg/g; 6 months ago 642mg/g; 3 months ago 536mg/g; current 488mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 86mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 39mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 121mg/dL; 9 months ago 120mg/dL; 6 months ago 139mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 128mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.2g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.84 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
